title: Additional Decorations
description: A small scale Minecraft mod that adds some vanilla friendly decorative blocks to the game. Made for Fabric, supports Minecraft 1.20.1.
body:
# Additional Decorations
Additional Decorations is a small mod with a vanilla friendly focus that adds various new blocks to the game to aid with building. These include:
- Ingot Stacks (For all ingots)
- Brick Stacks (Regular and nether brick)
- Clay Bucket
- Wood Stumps (For all wood variants)
- Rocks (For stone, granite, diorite, and andesite)
- Wood Pallets (For all wood variants)

All blocks feature crafting recipes.

This mod requires Fabric API for Minecraft 1.20.1

You may use this mod in a modpack.

<details>
